common.tagline: The digital platform for your homeowners' association
common.slowConnection: The connection seems slow. Check your internet.
common.errorBody: Try again or contact your administrator.
common.notImplemented: This feature is registered but its page is not available in this build.
common.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled for your association.

auth.noAsociatie: You don't have an association configured yet.
auth.demoMode: Demo mode — no backend configured. Displayed data is sample data.

onboarding.title: Association setup
onboarding.name: Association name
onboarding.csvHelp: Upload a CSV with columns: scara, etaj, numar_apartament, suprafata_utila, cota_parte_indiviza, proprietar_principal_name
onboarding.csvError: The file could not be read. Check the column format.
onboarding.selectFeatures: Choose the features to enable. You can change these anytime.
onboarding.finishHint: After finishing you can generate invite codes for residents.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Enable or disable association features. Disabled ones disappear for residents.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.empty: No announcements published yet. You'll be notified when the administrator posts something.

polls.title: Polls
polls.empty: No active polls. The committee will announce proposals here.

tickets.title: Issues
tickets.empty: No open issues. If you notice a problem in the building, report it with the button below.
tickets.submitted: Issue submitted. You'll be notified at each status change.

events.title: Events calendar
events.empty: No scheduled events. The committee will announce the next General Assembly here.

locator.title: Neighbour posts
locator.subtitle: Informal neighbour-to-neighbour posts. Auto-archived after 14 days.
locator.empty: No active posts. Publish the first one with the button above.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Search quick answers to common questions.
faq.empty: No results. Try other terms or ask your administrator.

ideas.title: Idea box
ideas.subtitle: Suggest ideas for the building. The most-voted reach the committee agenda.
ideas.empty: No ideas yet. Suggest the first one with the button above.

surveys.title: Opinion surveys
surveys.subtitle: Non-binding surveys. Anonymous by default, no quorum.

repairs.title: Repair history
repairs.subtitle: Search past building repairs and check warranties.
repairs.empty: No repairs found. Adjust the filters or search term.

lending.title: Borrowable items
lending.subtitle: Tools and items neighbours lend out. Message the owner directly.
lending.name: Item
lending.empty: No items listed. Add the first one with the button above.

meters.title: Meter readings
meters.subtitle: Submit your meter indices monthly, between the 1st and 5th.
meters.errorBelowPrevious: The index cannot be lower than the previous one.
meters.anomaly: Unusually high consumption. Check the value — it will be flagged for the administrator.

directory.title: Neighbours
directory.subtitle: A contact directory between neighbours. You appear only if you opt in.
directory.consentHint: You control what others see. Change it anytime.
directory.empty: No neighbours listed yet. Be the first to opt in above.

thankyous.title: Wall of thanks
thankyous.subtitle: Publicly thank a neighbour who lent a hand.
thankyous.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to thank a neighbour.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Definitions for terms from bills and General Assemblies.
glossary.empty: No term found. Try another word.

emergency.title: Emergency numbers
emergency.empty: The administrator hasn't configured emergency numbers yet.

alerts.title: Building alerts
alerts.confirmSend: This alert will be sent immediately to all residents, bypassing quiet hours. Continue?
alerts.empty: No emergency alerts have been sent.

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.empty: No apartments imported. Use the import step in setup.
